title: Fast starts: describe your shoppers to AI, or start from a preset

publish.description: Two quick ways to create a segment rule: describe your shoppers in plain English for AI to build, or start from a ready-made preset.

intro: You don't have to build a rule by hand. qSortBy offers two fast starts: describe your shoppers in plain English and let AI create the groups for you, or pick a ready-made preset and tweak it. This guide walks through both.

steps.heading: Describe your shoppers to AI
steps.body: Open **Segment Rules** from the left menu, then **Create segment rule**. With the **Describe your shoppers** start, you just type who you want to reach and what they should see — for example, *reward repeat buyers with categories they love, and show new visitors my best sellers*. Write it the way you'd explain it to a colleague; AI turns it into shopper groups and ranking signals.

els.text: Open Segment Rules from the left menu, then Create segment rule — this is the Describe your shoppers start.

steps.heading: Generate the rule
steps.body: Select **Generate** and AI builds the shopper groups, audience conditions, and ranking signals from your description. Everything it creates is fully editable — treat it as a strong first draft, then fine-tune any group by hand. Prefer to keep going yourself? Select **or build it manually** instead.

els.text: Select Generate — AI drafts the groups and signals, and you can edit anything afterward.

notes.text: Use Refine writing to tidy your description before generating, or Suggest to name the rule.

steps.heading: Or start from a preset
steps.body: Prefer a proven starting point? The **preset** start loads a ready-made shopper group — here, **Returning customers** — already wired with audience conditions and ranking signals. Use **Start from a template** to swap in another preset, then adjust the audience and signals to fit your store.

els.text: A preset arrives pre-built. Use Start from a template to swap it, then tweak to fit.

outro: Both fast starts drop you into the same editor: AI builds from your description, presets give you a proven template. From here you can adjust every group, or switch to building from scratch for full control.
